# Jinghang Global Supply Chain

> Jinghang Global Supply Chain is positioned as a China supply chain coordination partner for overseas hardware startups, product brands, and growing businesses without an in-house China sourcing team.

Canonical site: https://jinghang-global-supply-chain.pages.dev/
Public enquiry email: xx22497160@gmail.com
Legal entity: Shenzhen Jinghang Freight Forwarding Co., Ltd.

## What the company coordinates

- Supplier search, evaluation support, sample follow-up, and purchasing coordination
- Quality control and pre-shipment inspection coordination
- Receiving, labeling, repacking, and multi-supplier consolidation
- International logistics and agreed DDP or DAP delivery arrangements, subject to route and project review
- Battery, sensitive, oversized, and other special cargo assessment, subject to documents and feasibility
- Overseas warehouse preparation, fulfillment, dropshipping, and return-handling coordination

## Who the service is designed for

- Hardware startups moving from samples to production and delivery
- Small and mid-sized businesses without a dedicated China procurement team
- Product brands coordinating one or more factories in China

- [Insights](https://jinghang-global-supply-chain.pages.dev/insights/)
- [Discuss a Project](https://jinghang-global-supply-chain.pages.dev/contact)
- [Privacy Notice](https://jinghang-global-supply-chain.pages.dev/privacy)

## Important qualification

Service availability, DDP/DAP responsibilities, customs treatment, timing, and pricing depend on the product, documents, origin, destination, cargo details, and agreed scope. The site does not claim guaranteed customs outcomes, delivery times, or project results.
